Metadata.title: Nemory - Smart Journal
Metadata.description: Private AI journal for thoughts, goals, mood tracking and personal growth.

Hero.subtitle: Capture thoughts, track emotions, set goals and reflect with AI - all in one place.

Credibility.title: Credibility
Credibility.card1: A private space for your thoughts
Credibility.card2: AI that helps you understand yourself better
Credibility.card3: Goals, habits and insights in one place

Journaling.title: Write freely, reflect more deeply
Journaling.description: A private space for your thoughts, emotions, and everyday moments — designed to help you slow down, process, and reflect with more clarity.

AiReflection.title: AI that helps you notice what matters
AiReflection.description: Get thoughtful reflections that help you better understand your emotions, patterns, and the things that may be shaping your day.

Goals.title: Turn reflection into real progress
Goals.description: Connect your journal with goals, habits, and personal insights so growth feels more intentional, more visible, and easier to sustain.

CoreFeatures.title: How Nemory supports your growth
CoreFeatures.description: Nemory helps you move from scattered thoughts to clearer self-understanding, meaningful action, and steady personal progress.

card1.title: See yourself more clearly
card1.description: Nemory helps you go beyond raw thoughts by turning your entries into clearer self-understanding through reflection, patterns, and AI-guided insight.

card2.title: Get support when your mind feels full
card2.description: Instead of being left alone with everything you feel, Nemory helps you process mental and emotional overload with a calmer space to reflect and respond.

card3.title: Turn reflection into real change
card3.description: Nemory connects your thoughts with goals, habits, and personal direction — so self-awareness can become something practical, not just personal.

card4.title: Notice growth that is easy to miss
card4.description: By bringing together your entries, patterns, and progress over time, Nemory helps you see meaningful change that would otherwise stay invisible day to day.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.description: A simple flow that helps you turn everyday thoughts into reflection, deeper conversation and personal growth.

card1.title: Capture what’s on your mind
card1.description: Write about your day, your thoughts, or whatever feels important in the moment.

card2.title: Get a reflection from Nemory
card2.description: Nemory responds with a thoughtful reflection that helps you better understand your emotions, decisions and experiences.

card3.title: Continue in chat
card3.description: Ask follow-up questions, explore a specific situation, or go deeper into what you are feeling through an ongoing conversation with Nemory.

card4.title: Turn reflection into growth
card4.description: Use your insights to build more awareness through your journal, goals, habits and personal progress over time.

SafeSpace.title: A personal space for honest reflection
SafeSpace.description: Local storage, encrypted data, and AI reflections built from your journal entries.
SafeSpace.point1: Your journal entries are stored locally on your device, so your writing stays with you.
SafeSpace.point2: Your local database is encrypted to better protect your notes, reflections, and personal records.
SafeSpace.point3: When AI generates reflections or replies, it uses relevant parts of your journal entries to create a meaningful response.

Showcase.title: A journal that feels like your space
Showcase.description: Explore beautifully crafted themes or create your own with custom backgrounds and colors, so your journal feels truly personal.

FinalCTA.subTitle: Start your journey with Nemory
FinalCTA.description: Capture your thoughts, get thoughtful AI reflections, and keep your goals, habits, and insights in one calm, private space.

items.question: What is Nemory?
items.answer: Nemory is a private journaling app designed to help you capture your thoughts, reflect with AI, and stay connected to your goals, habits, and personal growth.

items.question: How does AI help inside Nemory?
items.answer: AI in Nemory helps you reflect on what you write, notice patterns, and gain clearer personal insights. It is designed to support your thinking, not replace it.

items.question: Is my journal private?
items.answer: Your journal is designed to be a personal and private space. When you use AI features, parts of your entries are securely sent to our AI providers to generate responses. This is only used to support your reflection.

items.question: Can I use Nemory for goals and habits too?
items.answer: Yes. Nemory brings together journaling, goals, habits, and insights in one place, so your daily thoughts and long-term growth stay connected.

items.question: Do I need to write every day?
items.answer: Not at all. Nemory is here whenever you need it, whether you journal every day or only when you want to slow down, reflect, and process your thoughts.

items.question: Is Nemory only for journaling?
items.answer: No. Along with journaling, Nemory helps you track habits, work toward goals, and better understand your progress over time.

items.question: Where can I download Nemory?
items.answer: Nemory is currently available on Google Play.

items.question: Who is Nemory for?
items.answer: Nemory is for anyone who wants a calmer, more thoughtful way to journal, reflect, and grow, whether you are building habits, working toward goals, or simply trying to understand yourself better.

Footer.description: A calm space for journaling, reflection, and growth.
